title: bridge_runner has no taskqueue processing phase
description: bridge_runner.py calls add_task() to enqueue tasks from inbox messages (LF-S46-001 fix) but never calls process_next_task() to execute them. The main loop had Phases 1-6 (bridge poll, inbox check, struggle detection, autonomy, wake check, session loop) but no taskqueue drain phase. Result: 28 Lucius-delegated tasks accumulated in active.json over sessions S47-S49 without a single completion from the delegation pipeline.
fix: Added Phase 2.5 to bridge_runner main loop: calls process_next_task() every 6 cycles (~60s). PR #99.
